heroHeadline: Afghanistan and Pakistan Agree to Explore 'Comprehensive Solution' via China; Asadabad Shelled as Urumqi Talks Continue
heroSubtitle: From 9/11 to Taliban takeover to interstate conflict: 8,950+ days of war — now an active cross-border clash between nuclear-armed neighbors mediated by Beijing
footerNote: Data sourced from UNAMA, SIGAR, ACLED, Brown University Costs of War Project, US DoD, Reuters, BBC, Tolo News, Dawn, Al Jazeera, HRW, OHCHR
